title: Joyful Noise

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Make a joyful noise to the Lord, all the earth,
Serve Him with gladness, for all He’s worth.
Come into His presence with songs of praise,
Our hearts uplifted, our voices raised.
Know that the Lord is our mighty King,
He made us all; to Him we bring.
We are His people, His pasture’s sheep,
Forever loved, His word we keep.
Enter His gates with thanksgiving, true,
His courts with praise for all He’ll do.
Give thanks to His name, bless it always,
For endless mercy fills our days.
For the Lord is good, His love remains,
Through all the ages, His truth sustains.
Know that the Lord is our mighty King,
He made us all; to Him we bring.
We are His people, His pasture’s sheep,
Forever loved, His word we keep.
Shout with joy to the Lord above,
Sing His truth and endless love.

epigraph: Make a joyful noise unto the LORD
styleNote: String Guitar And Clarinet · Darbuka Rhythms Grow Steady · All Voices Join Together
